text.title: role-specialized-models Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for role-specialized-models as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Splitting by step rather than role: "step-1 = haiku, step-2 = sonnet, step-3 = opus".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Steps with the same cognitive role get different models, breaking the leverage. A long execution step does not need Opus just because it is the last step.

failure-mode.description: Letting the weakest model both classify AND execute when classification confidence is low.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The cheap model masks its own uncertainty; without a verification gate, low-confidence classifications silently propagate into execution.
